full_text:
Pan Jun (Chengming) 潘濬 (承明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Jun (潘濬), styledChengming (承明), was born in Wuling. Began his career under Liu Biao then Liu Bei. After Guan Yu’s death, served in Wu. Pan Jun was affiliated with Liu Biao, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wu Kingdom. Pan Jun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
